scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that make_tmfa_problem creates namespaces, variables, mass balance constraints, and sets objective to maximize sum of fluxes. Uses the default MetabolicModel with two reactions and two compounds.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that the function sets an objective function maximizing the sum of fluxes.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The function must call prob.set_objective with an expression that sums the flux variables for all reactions.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old behavior did not set objective, so prob.objective would be None, causing assertion failure.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
prob, v, zi, dgri, xij, compounds = make_tmfa_problem(model, solver)
print("Namespaces:", list(prob.namespaces.keys()))
print("Flux vars:", v.vars)
print("Binary vars:", zi.vars)
print("Gibbs vars:", dgri.vars)
print("Concentration vars:", xij.vars)
print("Compounds:", compounds)
result = {'prob': prob, 'v': v, 'zi': zi, 'dgri': dgri, 'xij': xij, 'compounds': compounds}
covered_requirements: The returned prob object must have a non-None objective attribute that represents the sum of flux variables.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Test with a larger model having three reactions and three compounds. Verify that mass balance constraints exist for all compounds and objective includes all reactions.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that the function scales correctly to a larger model, creating mass balance constraints for each compound.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: For any metabolic model, the function must create one linear constraint per compound reflecting mass balance.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: If function does not correctly iterate over compounds or misses constraints, assertion will fail.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
prob, v, zi, dgri, xij, compounds = make_tmfa_problem(model, solver)
result = {'prob': prob, 'v': v, 'zi': zi, 'dgri': dgri, 'xij': xij, 'compounds': compounds}
covered_requirements: The function must work for any MetabolicModel (reactions, compounds, matrix).
The returned prob must contain a constraint for each compound.
